notes: Return the result to the coordinator as discrepancy_found; do not mark codex_verified.
Preserve explicit narrow positive allergens while removing unsupported culinary inferences and any implication that arrays are complete.
Reconcile the current 27-product Toast surface and all active official menu surfaces before making catalog-completeness claims.
Reopen and anchor the currently linked PDFs before relying on item-level PDF extraction.
Keep negative, may-contain, and cross-contact fields unavailable unless an explicit authoritative disclosure is obtained.

identity.name: Bastille Brasserie & Bar
identity.notes: All restaurant-issued pages/PDFs and linked Toast identify the same Alexandria restaurant; no other location was merged.

restaurantLevelAllergenEvidence.statement: We use many allergens in preparation and cannot guarantee no cross contamination.
restaurantLevelAllergenEvidence.application: Recorded as restaurant-level risk only; no generic item-level mayContain values created.
